allow: PowerShell(Get-Command python, py, python3, python3.12 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Set-Location 'C:\\Users\\kopec\\Development\\tomlplus\\lsp'; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\release.ps1 -Action build -Target rust 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

PowerShell($tools = 'go','ruby','gem','bundle','javac','jar','mvn','dotnet'; foreach \($t in $tools\) {$got = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($got\) {"{0,-10} {1}" -f $t, $got.Source} else {"{0,-10} \(not installed\)" -f $t}})
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; xs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['nameWithOwner']\) for r in xs if 'tomlplus' in r['nameWithOwner'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(git -c user.email=kopeccarson@gmail.com -c 'user.name=Carson Kopec' commit -m 'initial: tomlplus workspace with 8 bindings, LSP, CLI, VS Code extension, CI *)
